summary: Frontend-only retest completed on public URL for CSV Import bug fix. Import tab is visible for admin, CSV lead import works, app auto-switches to Leads tab, imported lead appears immediately without hard refresh, and role filter + search interaction works after import.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py remains very large (>1400 lines); split by domain/version modules for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created one CSV-imported lead during retest: AUTO CSV <timestamp>.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revalidated original CSV visibility bug fix using admin account on public URL. Imported lead became visible instantly after import, with auto-tab switch to Leads and correct role filter/search behavior.
rca of the issue: Previously reported issue appears resolved after fix path that resets lead filters/search, auto-switches to Leads tab, and refreshes lead data immediately after import. Reproduction from iteration_3 no longer occurs in this run.
